settings.default: Refer to the care label inside the garment for full instructions. Machine wash cold with like colours. Reshape and dry flat.

settings.label: Shipping, Returns & Exchange (default)
settings.default:
Shipping

  • Free shipping on all orders.
  • A ₹100 COD (Cash on Delivery) charge applies to COD orders below ₹3,000.
  • For international orders, customs duties may be levied at the time of delivery in certain countries.
  • Products are shipped from our warehouse within 4 working days.
  • Orders are delivered within 10 working days.
  • You will receive an order tracking number as soon as we ship your order.

Returns

  • 7-day return policy (returnable products only). Jewellery, socks, scarves, innerwear, masks, and items discounted 50% or more — including Mega Sale purchases — are non-returnable.
  • Returned products must be unused, unworn, and have their original tags intact.
  • No returns or exchanges are applicable on products purchased from the outlet sale.
  • A non-refundable charge of ₹100 applies to all COD orders below ₹3,000. Additionally, a non-refundable charge of ₹300 applies to all COD orders for footwear.
  • Shipping charges and COD charges are non-refundable.
  • International orders are not eligible for return.
  • Please share an unboxing video of the package for any wrong or missing item received.
  • Do not hand over the product without a pick-up slip or SMS confirmation.
  • Items purchased during a sale are non-returnable.
  • Post-wash queries are entertained only within one month from the date of delivery.
  • Only exchange is applicable on orders purchased on sale/offer.
  • Only a one-time exchange is allowed.
  • If your pin code is outside our serviceable area, you must self-ship the product via reverse logistics (your courier cost should not exceed ₹300 — we request you self-ship via Speed Post).
  • Do not accept the package if it is tampered with.
  • All COD orders will be refunded via gift cards, as payouts are currently on hold in compliance with RBI guidelines.
  • Do not share the OTP with the carrier if you have not received the product.

Exchange

  • Exchange is not available for masks, boxers, socks, and products at or below ₹899.
  • There is no additional charge for any exchange orders.
  • For new orders of a lower price, the balance amount will be refunded as a gift voucher.
  • Size exchange is subject to availability.
  • Please share an unboxing video of the package for any wrong product received.
  • For further details, refer to our Terms & Conditions and FAQ.
settings.info: Shown when a product has no Shipping, Returns & Exchange metafield set. Leave empty to use the built-in default policy.
